global_description: Medium-sized mammal with a stout, rounded body, short legs, and a flat, broad snout. Skin is typically pink or light brown, often with sparse coarse hair. Ears are floppy and the tail is short and curly.

part_details.head: Large with a flat, broad snout and floppy ears
part_details.body: Stout and rounded, covered in sparse coarse hair
part_details.skin: Pink or light brown, often with sparse hair
